positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration featuring a friendly, fluffy fox wearing a small wizard's hat, sitting next to a glowing forest mushroom. The style should mimic Studio Ghibli concept art, using soft pastels, warm light, and a sense of gentle magic. Full body illustration, detailed foliage.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, monochrome
